title: ursinia quinquepartita
intro: Ursinia quinquepartita, also known as the five-lobed daisy or Cape daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern part of South Africa. It is a member of the daisy family, Asteraceae, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections. Ursinia quinquepartita can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote health and well-being.
